name: Delirious Thrall

abilities.name: Demise (Shattered Glass)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (x)2".

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

actions.name: Mirrored Image
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model and the target may not cheat fate during this action.

triggers.name: Spiderwebbed Fractures
triggers.text: Enemy models within (r)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Frantic Attack
triggers.text: This model deals 1 irreducible damage to itself. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: Grab On
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token. End this model's activation.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Final Reflection
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: Base size STN: 5 is visible on card front
The (x) in Demise ability text appears to be a range icon, likely representing a range value of 2"
